special_mechanics.name: Grab/Body Slam
special_mechanics.description: Players can grab adversaries to perform body slam, pile driver, or atomic back drop attacks

special_mechanics.name: Knockback/Environmental Destruction
special_mechanics.description: Giant monsters can kick over skyscrapers and stadiums during combat

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source contains gameplay mechanics and character information but no quantitative physics parameters. Fighting game mechanics focus on punch, kick, and grab actions rather than detailed movement physics. Genesis port developed by SPS, released March 1993 in NA.
sources_used: wikipedia - King of the Monsters (video game)
